title: The Man Involved In Every American Conspiracy
summary: Danny Sheehan, a public interest attorney who has been involved in major American conspiracies including Watergate, the Pentagon Papers, and Karen Silkwood, discusses his extensive knowledge of UFO programs, his representation of UFO whistleblowers like Lou Elizondo and John Mack, and shares extraordinary claims about extraterrestrial beings, remote viewing programs, and controlled disclosure efforts by the US government.

acronyms.definition: Annual defense budget legislation that included the Schumer Amendment regarding UAP disclosure
Pentagon program that studied UFOs from 2007-2012, run by Lou Elizondo

programs_mentioned: Office of Naval Intelligence remote viewing program

events.description: December 17th New York Times front page story about AATIP program with Lou Elizondo and Chris Mellon
July 26th Congressional hearing where David Grusch testified about crash retrievals and non-human biologics
AATIP program began under Harry Reid's appropriation
January 1st is the operative date in the NDAA statute for gathering all UFO-related information
October 20th deadline for all military services and intelligence agencies to compile UFO information

key_claims.claim: The 2017 New York Times UFO story and videos were authorized by the Defense Department's Office of Pre-publication Review and Security
The US government has extraterrestrial beings in underground military bases including at S4 near Area 51
A dying witness named Albert Stein claimed to have seen an extraterrestrial being being interviewed at S4 who said they were from different star systems monitoring life on planets
Ingo Swann was a spy for the Church of Scientology, providing reports on the Office of Naval Intelligence remote viewing program
Pat Price could remotely view the exact location of Russian nuclear submarines and read files inside CIA facilities
A remote viewing experiment using Pat Price caused 85% of people in Michigan's northern peninsula to file tax forms at a specific location in West Virginia through telepathic projection
Congress and the President ordered all six military services and 18 intelligence agencies to compile all UFO information by October 20, 2024
Aerospace companies like Lockheed Martin want to secure patent rights to UFO technology so the government will have to license it from them
The Church of Scientology's highest principle involves a confrontation between Pleiadians and reptilians from Zeta Reticuli over which will have major relations with Earth
There are over 700 UFO sightings from Project Blue Book that investigators found impossible to discount
